name: big-magic
description: Elizabeth Gilbert's Big Magic — creative living beyond fear: overcome perfectionism, work with inspiration, persist through difficulty, and trust your creative process
useCase: Helps anyone live a more creative life by addressing the five key challenges: courage (overcoming fear), enchantment (working with inspiration), permission (claiming your right to create), persistence (sticking with it), and trust (letting go of outcomes).
knownRisks: The book's approach is inspiration-focused — some users may need more structured techniques for executing creative work
